Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); const list=Array.isArray\(o\)?o:\(o.data||[]\); console.log\('Found', list.length, 'products:'\); list.forEach\(p=>console.log\(' -', p.code, '|', p.name, '| group:', p.group, '| variations:', JSON.stringify\(p.variations?.slice\(0,2\)\)\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); const list=Array.isArray\(o\)?o:\(o.data||[]\); console.log\('Full group object for first hit:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(list[0]?.group, null, 2\)\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\('Full variations:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(list[0]?.variations, null, 2\)\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\('code:', list[0]?.code\); console.log\('id:', list[0]?.id\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); const list=Array.isArray\(o\)?o:\(o.data||[]\); const hit = list.find\(p=>p.code==='6.1'\) || list[0]; console.log\('Product:', hit.code, hit.name\); console.log\('id:', hit.id\); console.log\('group:'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(hit.group, null, 2\)\); console.log\('---'\); console.log\('variations:', JSON.stringify\(hit.variations, null, 2\)\)}\)")
